programme.title: Mountain Monsters
programme.sub-title: The Silver Giant of Boone County
programme.desc: The team members look for a bear-like creature known as the Silver Giant in Boone County, and build their largest trap ever. Along the way they also learn about other beasts too

programme.title: Crikey! Its the Irwins
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of Steve Irwins family at Australia Zoo. After months of training with Steves best friend Wes, son Robert is ready to solo feed Graham, the zoos most notorious crocodile

programme.title: Richard E Grants Seven Deadly Sins
programme.desc: Actor Richard E Grant explores the origins of the seven cardinal sins, examining the dramatic effect they have. He begins with the evolutionary roots of wrath, learning that, like humans, animals also experience the sensation. Cutting-edge wildlife footage is used to illustrate his points as wrathful hippopotamuses take centre stage

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete Nelson travels to Germany in search of a range of different treetop homes, hooking up with his friend and former student Christopher Richter, and meeting Andreas Richter, who has a modern treehouse that sets him apart from the rest

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: An emaciated horse gives birth prematurely, and the foal is so weak Dr Thurston takes it home to bottle feed

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: The animal protection officers have cause to investigate a breeder

programme.title: Crikey! Its the Irwins
programme.desc: Terri returns to her hometown of Oregon to help Brady, a cougar in need of a health check. At the zoo, Bindi bathes an echidna with bad skin allergies

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: A routine check for a fishing license takes an unexpected turn. Wardens search for illicit hunters, and zebra mussels are found on a boat

programme.title: Dr Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: A dog with a shattered leg and seven bad-tempered chickens arrive at the clinic. The team unites when a tiny kitten is found unconscious at a construction site

programme.title: Dr Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr Nichols treats a cat injured in a fight with the dog next door, while a class of fourth-graders counts on Dr Jeff to save its pet hedgehog

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: The shelter faces one of its most challenging rescues when a domestic fire reveals a house full of dogs that now have nowhere to stay. Two teachers fall in love with a deaf puppy

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: A year after losing their house in a fire, M2 and Kanani do something special for the dog that saved their lives. A parolee returns after a mysterious absence

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: An owner puts his badly behaved cat in kitty jail, and a problem feline leaves bowel movements and shredded furniture in its wake

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: A cat that has undergone a transplant operation becomes aggressive, and a feline appears unhappy when its owners boyfriend moves in to the house

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete Nelson designs private treetop escapes for those who wish to reconnect with nature

programme.title: Meet the Superbrains
programme.desc: Documentary showcasing the work of scientists conducting ambitious research projects, beginning with two teams of inventors seeking to harness the power of the sun

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: How can elephants hear something hundreds of miles away? What goes on inside a chickens egg? How has an incredible snake learnt how to fly?

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: How can a fish fly the length of three football fields? Can a spider be adorable? Whats the real story behind a flamingos colour?

programme.title: Extinct or Alive
programme.desc: Forrest Galante returns to his childhood home in Zimbabwe searching for the extinct Cape lion after numerous sightings of a similar size lion with a black mane

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: The Browns work to protect their newest family member from bears, which are now seeking food on Chichagof Island. Plus, Matt races for his life as he sets a course for home

programme.desc: Eivin takes novice hunter Levi on a hunt. Meanwhile, Otto and the crew work to repair the Constructor boat

programme.title: Edge of Alaska
programme.desc: Jeremy risks everything as he crosses a frozen river in a two-tonne bulldozer, and Jenny tackles a dangerous survival mission with her newborn baby

programme.title: Edge of Alaska
programme.desc: The town faces a harsh recovery period in the wake of a powerful wind storm, and Mark faces the task of clearing away dangerously damaged trees

programme.title: The Haunted
programme.desc: A dark spirit menaces a womans tranquil home, and she worries that it may be a deceased relative who was a master of the occult

programme.title: Million Dollar Duck

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?

programme.desc: The team is in Mpumalanga, South Africa, searching for the Cape mole-rat. The animal has giant, razor-sharp teeth and is known as the king of the underground

programme.title: Peter, Paul and Mary: Rhythm on Two
programme.desc: Part one. A concert given by the well known American folk trio during their 1980s visit to the United Kingdom, recorded on location at the Southport Theatre. First broadcast 28 September 1983

programme.title: Peter, Paul and Mary: Rhythm on Two
programme.desc: The second part of the concert performed by the American folk trio, recorded at the Southport Theatre. First broadcast 26 November 1983

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Jayne Middlemiss presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on May 14, 1999. Featuring 911, Bryan Adams, Whitney Houston, Fierce, Kula Shaker, Pete Heller, Stereophonics and Backstreet Boys

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Scott Mills presents the pop chart programme, first broacast on May 21, 1999. Featuring Shania Twain, Geri Halliwell, Super Furry Animals, Skunk Anansie, Powerhouse featuring Duane Harden, 1000 Clowns, Happy Mondays and Boyzone

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Noel Edmonds presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on March 2, 1978. Featuring performances by Darts, Kate Bush, Nick Lowe, Andy Williams, Samantha Sang, Rita Coolidge, the Tom Robinson Band and Abba

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Jakki Brambles presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on February 28, 1991. Featuring performances by N-Joi, Massive Attack, Jesus Jones, Free, the Clash, the Source featuring Candi Staton, Madonna and the Simpsons

programme.title: Design Classics
programme.desc: A look at the map of the London Underground railway network, originally created in 1931 by graphics revolutionary Harry Beck

programme.title: The Good Old Days
programme.desc: Leonard Sachs hosts a 1976 edition of old-time music hall programme from the Leeds City Varieties. Artists Taking to the stage are Les Dawson, Peggy Mount, Larry Parker, Jeannie Harris, Chantal and Dumont, Albert Aldred and members of the Players Theatre London, and there is a performance from the Jan Madd Magic Show

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: The sleuthing housewife investigates a spiritualist who appears to be blackmailing her customers, while Geoffrey falls in love, but his secret romance threatens to undermine Hettys carefully laid trap - and nearly causes him to quit the agency

programme.title: The Turkish Detective
programme.desc: A serial killer appears to be targeting rubbish collectors in a poverty-stricken neighbourhood of Istanbul. With Ikmen on leave looking after his new baby, Ayse leads the investigation instead, and Suleyman finally entrusts her with the secret shes suspected for so long

programme.title: The Turkish Detective
programme.desc: With his family still growing, Ikmen decides its time to mature a bit and seek promotion. Suleyman goes undercover as a rubbish collector to try to find the serial killer before they strike again, while Ayse turns to an unlikely old acquaintance for help

programme.title: Brief History of a Family (2024)
programme.desc: Enigmatic 15-year-old Yan Shuo is injured in an accident caused by Tu Wei, a classmate from an affluent family. Wei invites Shuo to his house, where he impresses the Tu family and begins to feel at home. Psychological thriller, starring Keyu Guo. In Mandarin

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Hyacinth visits a stately home, where she naturally tries her hardest to meet the lord of the manor - only to be thwarted by the untimely arrival of Onslow and Daisy. Suburban comedy, starring Patricia Routledge, Clive Swift and Geoffrey Hughes

programme.title: Sorry!
programme.desc: Timothy Lumsden meets Annette at his amateur dramatics society, but all his attempts to court her are ruined by his overbearing and tyrannical mother. First episode of the comedy, starring Ronnie Corbett and Barbara Lott

programme.title: The Good Old Days
programme.desc: Leonard Sachs hosts a 1976 edition of old-time music hall programme from the Leeds City Varieties. Artists Taking to the stage are Les Dawson, Peggy Mount, Larry Parker, Jeannie Harris, Chantal and Dumont, Albert Aldred and members of the Players Theatre London, and there is a performance from the Jan Madd Magic Show

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: The sleuthing housewife investigates a spiritualist who appears to be blackmailing her customers, while Geoffrey falls in love, but his secret romance threatens to undermine Hettys carefully laid trap - and nearly causes him to quit the agency

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Julian Richards investigates the discovery of a human jawbone in a farmers field in Cheshire, which led to the unearthing of a 12th-century chapel and the remains of medieval landowners. As archaeologists piece together the clues, Julian is able to present a Hampshire teacher with an image of his ancestors

programme.title: Travels with Pevsner
programme.desc: Janet Street-Porter visits some of the architectural highlights of North Yorkshire, including Scarborough, Castle Howard, Ebberston Hall, Mount Grace Priory and Middlesbroughs Transporter Bridge

programme.title: One Hundred Great Paintings
programme.desc: Examining John Constables last depiction of Salisbury Cathedral, the final example of many beautiful sketches and paintings that the artist made of the building. Hugh Casson narrates

programme.title: Humphrey Burton: The Huw Wheldon Lecture
programme.desc: The 1991 address by the producer and director in which he talks about the achievements of Monitor, the BBCs first TV arts magazine, and reflects on what programme-makers have to learn from those pioneering days. Among the examples used by Burton are films commissioned by Huw Wheldon from Ken Russell and John Schlesinger, two young directors who went on to greater things, and studio interviews with Orson Welles and Ninette de Valois

programme.title: Humphrey Burton: Conversations with Glenn Gould
programme.desc: The celebrated and idiosyncratic Canadian pianist talks to and plays for Burton, explaining why he decided to shun live performance and dedicate his time to the recording studio

programme.title: Monitor
programme.sub-title: Humphrey Burton: Profile of a Quartet - Monitor 48 (R)
programme.desc: Huw Wheldon introduces Burtons film for arts magazine Monitor following chamber music ensemble the Allegri Quartet. The programme shows the quartet rehearsing, preparing for concerts and recitals, recording for the BBC and organising their schedules, as well as the part played by their agents, and a look at their home lives. First broadcast in 1960

programme.title: Arena
programme.desc: Director Ronald Eyre presents the first episode of the long-running arts documentary series created by Humphrey Burton when he was head of Music and Arts at the BBC. Eyre looks selectively and critically at what is coming on, or doing well, in theatres, while Kenneth Tynan talks to Laurence Olivier about Lilian Baylis, the eccentric founder of The Old Vic. There is also a film about David Hockneys sets for The Rakes Progress, on tour after its success at Glyndebourne. First broadcast in 1975

programme.title: An Enemy of the People
programme.desc: A man becomes public enemy number one after standing up for his beliefs. Maggie Allens 1980 adaptation of Lindsay Galloways stage version of Henrik Ibsens play, set in the west of Scotland and starring Robert Urquhart and Michael Sheard

programme.title: Brand
programme.desc: A religious zealot refuses to compromise, leading him to risk catastrophe for himself and his beloved family. Michael Meyers 1959 adaptation of Henrik Ibsens verse tragedy about an uncompromising priest. Starrng Patrick McGoohan, Dilys Hamlett, Patrick Wymark and Peter Sallis

programme.title: Humphrey Burton: The Huw Wheldon Lecture
programme.desc: The 1991 address by the producer and director in which he talks about the achievements of Monitor, the BBCs first TV arts magazine, and reflects on what programme-makers have to learn from those pioneering days. She follows that up with Bombay spiced roast potatoes, with sticky tamarind coating, and chicken smothered in yoghurt marinade, coated in Nadiyas essential spices. To finish, she serves up coconut and fennel-fragranced Bundt cake topped with a coconut fudge layer

programme.title: Live Six Nations Rugby Union
programme.desc: Scotland v France (Kick-off 2.10pm). Gabby Logan presents coverage of the both teams fourth and penultimate match of the championship, held at Scottish Gas Murrayfield. France secured the title with a 35-16 victory over Scotland at Stade de France last year and also won 20-16 at this venue in 2024. However, the Scots prevailed 31-20 in their only other home match of this campaign and that contest will give them high hopes of another strong display this afternoon. With analysis from John Barclay, Martin Johnson and Benjamin Kayser, and commentary by Andrew Cotter, Chris Paterson and Sam Warburton

programme.title: Asia
programme.desc: Animals that live in Asias deserts and dry grasslands, including the Gobi bear, one of the rarest animals on Earth who communicate by leaving their scent on ancient trees. The Thar in India is the most densely populated desert in the world, and a place where Demoiselle cranes migrate thousands of miles to reach, being welcomed with grain put out by the local Jain community

programme.title: Match of the Day Live: The FA Cup
programme.desc: Wrexham v Chelsea (Kick-off 5.45pm). Mark Chapman presents all the action from the fifth-round tie at StoK Racecourse. Wrexham have progressed from the National League to fighting for promotion to the Premier League since being taken over by Rob McElhenney and Ryan Reynolds in 2020, and they have already defeated one top flight team here in this cup run, overcoming Nottingham Forest on penalties in round three. However, Chelsea represent an even tougher test, and they showed no mercy away to Championship opposition in the previous two rounds, defeating both Charlton Athletic and Hull City by four-goal margins. With analysis from Wayne Rooney, Micah Richards and Ben Tozer, and reports from Sarah Mulkerrins

Plus, Tom Heap investigates whats really in the sewage sludge spread as fertiliser

programme.desc: The last quarter-final sees the competitors taking an invention test in which they must serve up a dish based around mince. Only then will judges Monica Galetti and Marcus Wareing decide who deserves a place in knockout week

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Sister Veronica must decide her future now she is not currently a nun, but not fully part of the world either. The Maternity Home prepares to close its doors, but Dr Turner is determined to preserve equipment and resources for his patients until the last possible moment. The Mullucks fight for the rights of all Thalidomide victims, while Cyril and Rosalind prepare for their wedding

programme.title: The Capture
programme.desc: Detective drama, starring Holliday Grainger. Whistleblower Rachel Carey is ready to launch a revolutionary new camera network capable of catching live deep-fakes in action. programme.title: Bear Grylls: Wild Reckoning
programme.desc: The presenter tries to resolve conflicts in the wilderness, uniting people with unresolved feuds for a bespoke challenge set by a team of experts that will force them to work together. Former best friends Rhys and Niall work to repair their broken friendship. They drifted apart after the death of Nialls older brother and have barely spoken for two years

programme.title: Amanda and Alans Spanish Job
programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr embark on their first ever Spanish renovation job. Hoping to breathe new life into one of Andalusias forgotten villages, Amanda takes a gamble on a run-down three-storey townhouse and convinces Alan to help her to transform it into a boutique BandB. In a bid to push their DIY skills to a whole new level, the pair visit Granadas architectural marvel and the pinnacle of Moorish design - the Alhambra Palace. However, with over 2,000 square feet to contend with, a roof in need of repair and a crumbling outbuilding on its last legs, it seems they may be in over their heads

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: In Scotlands Central Lowlands, Sonali Shah helps a Canadian couple to make a rural escape and meets Californians who bought their dream home, sight unseen, and never looked back

programme.title: The Repair Shop on the Road
programme.desc: Dominic Chinea and Will Kirk travel around the UK fixing historical treasures and precious objects that are unable be brought to the programmes barn. In Chatham, they restore two vandalised memorial plaques for the fallen of the First World War on behalf of a proud military community, with the aid of a local bronze foundry

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene host the quiz in which Louise, Andrew, Warren, Grace and Jourdan race in moving podiums across the studio floor to try to win £5,000. The contenders battle across a series of fast-paced qualifiers and head-to-head races where the aim of the game is simple - to make it to the finish line before their rivals. The winner then races against the track itself in an attempt to win the cash prize

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong is joined by co-host Ed Gamble for the quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious answers

programme.title: BBC News at Six; Weather
programme.desc: The latest headlines

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: Tommy prepares for his first gym appearance since announcing his comeback, but with fighter Darren Till throwing threats and chaos into the mix, trainer John pulls Tommy out of the fight claiming he is unwilling to risk his sons future career. Its a crushing blow for Tommy, whos desperate for momentum and purpose. Amid the pressure, theres a flicker of hope - Tommy and partner Molly-Mae Hague are spotted together on New Years Eve, with a kiss that hints at a brighter future

programme.title: Louis Therouxs Forbidden America
programme.desc: The film-maker returns to the US to explore the impact of the internet and social media on some of the most controversial corners of American society. He begins by meeting the new influencers of the far-right who are promoting an ideology that is defiantly racist, misogynistic, homophobic and anti-Semitic, often packaging the most extreme views as irony. Louis attempts to understand their recent surge in popularity and challenges the divisive rhetoric that is being streamed to millions of young viewers online

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: Documentary following boxer Tommy Furys return to the ring. Tommy is at his lowest point personally and professionally, living alone in a house that was meant to be his and partner Molly-Maes forever home. His role as a father to baby Bambi brings both joy and pressure as he tries to convince Molly-Mae he is a changed man. After finally getting the medical all-clear to fight again, Tommy and his trainer and father John prepare for his return to the ring against MMA fighter Darren Till. Team Fury travels to the press conference - with John promising to be on his best behaviour

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: Tommy prepares for his first gym appearance since announcing his comeback, but with fighter Darren Till throwing threats and chaos into the mix, trainer John pulls Tommy out of the fight claiming he is unwilling to risk his sons future career. Its a crushing blow for Tommy, whos desperate for momentum and purpose. Amid the pressure, theres a flicker of hope - Tommy and partner Molly-Mae Hague are spotted together on New Years Eve, with a kiss that hints at a brighter future

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: Tommys fight for redemption continues, but this time, its a battle for his own mind. Struggling to secure a new opponent, he knows a comeback fight is crucial for his mental health. Meanwhile, Molly-Maes new series trailer drops, pushing Tommy to face his own truths in the toughest interview of his life, where he opens up about his battle with alcohol addiction. Back in training, hope returns as a potential fight looms, leading him and his father John to a career-defining meeting

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: Tommy is hopeful that he could be fighting again soon, and he and Molly-Mae are spending more time together. Then, disaster strikes when KSI cancels the night when Roman was due to be in the fighting, claiming illness. John is furious, but decides the boys need cheering up so tells them he is taking them on a camping trip. However, neither Tommy nor Roman share their fathers love of the outdoors

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Time Lord and the Ponds arrive in a Wild West town where the residents are being terrorised by a cyborg killing machine. The relentless gunslinger will stop at nothing until it has terminated the remaining name on its hit list - and it turns out to be targeting an alien doctor. Matt Smith stars, with Karen Gillan and Arthur Darvill

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Earth is invaded by millions of sinister-looking black cubes, but nobody knows what they are for and who sent them? Reunited with his allies at UNIT, the Doctor is forced to play a waiting game, so moves in with Amy and Rory. But months of living a normal life soon take a toll on his patience. Guest starring Steven Berkoff and Mark Williams, with Jemma Redgrave making her first appearance as UNIT leader Kate Stewart

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, the Wests join the Shipmans for one of Micks famous turkey dinners. Smithy can hardly wait to spend his first yuletide with baby Neil, but fails to realise Dave will be tagging along and playing happy families with Nessa. Meanwhile, Gavin and Stacey make an announcement that does not exactly fill their friends and relatives with joy, and Bryn has a heart-to-heart with Jason. Festive edition of the comedy from 2008, starring Mathew Horne and Joanna Page

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: A hypnotist is booked to provide the entertainment at the triplets baptism - and Agnes soon finds herself under his spell. Meanwhile, the matriarchs kitchen is falling apart - but that turns out to be the least of her problems when son Mark delivers some heartbreaking news. Hit comedy, starring Brendan OCarroll as the foul-mouthed mother-of-six

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Cathy goes to extreme lengths to impress her psychologist boyfriend, much to Agness disgust, while Rory locates the perfect apartment for him and Dino - the problem is, its in Kilbride, meaning hell have to learn to drive. Mark prepares to emigrate to Australia. Hit comedy, starring Brendan OCarroll as the foul-mouthed mother-of-six

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys DMovie (2014)
programme.desc: The indomitable Irish matriarch discovers that a plan is afoot by developers to buy the famous Dublin street market where her family has run a fruit and veg stall for generations. Assembling a band of eccentric allies, she plans to fight back, only to realise her daughter is not interested in taking over the family business. Comedy, starring Brendan OCarroll and Jennifer Gibney

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Jonnys job-hunting plans are put on hold by a sex-starved cat. Gaz comes face to face with the brother he never knew he had, and Louise chokes on her lunch. Comedy, starring Ralf Little and Will Mellor

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Gaz tries to spice up his sex life with Donna using whipped cream, Janets attempt to quit smoking has an alarming side-effect, and Louise discovers the identity of her secret admirer. Comedy, starring Ralf Little, Will Mellor, Natalie Casey and Sheridan Smith

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Jonny gets more than he bargained for when he begs Janets dad for his blessing to marry his daughter. Donna plans a kinky night in to ensure Gaz and Munch get an eyeful and Louise plays strange love games with David. Comedy, starring Ralf Little and Sheridan Smith

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Munch falls for Donna, Louise has to live with a sordid secret from Davids past and Janet gets caught in a conflict between her two bridesmaids. Comedy, starring Natalie Casey and Lee Oakes

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Gaz lands in hospital when he attempts to avoid Munch, and Jonny tries to persuade Janets father to approve of their marriage and pay for the ceremony - but ends up blackmailing him into agreeing. Sitcom, starring Ralf Little, Will Mellor, Natalie Casey, Kathryn Drysdale and Sheridan Smith

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: The girls go shopping for Janets wedding dress, little suspecting what an epic adventure they are embarking on. Jonny and Gaz decide to set out on a search of their own, and are thrilled to discover an unattended barrel of beer. Comedy, starring Ralf Little and Will Mellor

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, the Wests join the Shipmans for one of Micks famous turkey dinners. Smithy can hardly wait to spend his first yuletide with baby Neil, but fails to realise Dave will be tagging along and playing happy families with Nessa. Meanwhile, Gavin and Stacey make an announcement that does not exactly fill their friends and relatives with joy, and Bryn has a heart-to-heart with Jason. Festive edition of the comedy from 2008, starring Mathew Horne and Joanna Page

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Linda is worried for Johnny and admits to Elaine that she could have stopped Tims test on Callum. Julie is pleased when the care home calls to say Nigels place is available when hes ready to leave the hospital. However, Julie and Phil have another decision to make when Nigel keeps asking to see Clare

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Linda is frantic as she tells Johnny that Max has taken Tim, and Ravi feels guilty about the prospect of Mark being arrested, but Priya demands he stay out of it. Elsewhere, Phil tries to convince Julie to call Clare, but she puts her foot down, and Howie is determined to make a difference

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Priya and Ravi remain at odds over whether he should warn Mark. Patrick advises Howie not to waste another day getting Kim back, so he plans a big surprise at the Albert, and there is conflict between Nigels loved ones

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Julie is furious to discover Clare and Lexi have discharged Nigel without telling her, and Chelsea supports Clare as she and Julie struggle to resolve their differences. Later, Clare and Phil take Nigel to the care home to settle him in, and the enormity of the situation takes a heavy toll on them

programme.title: The End We Start From (2023)
programme.desc: A woman and her newborn must find their way home after an environmental crisis leaves London submerged by floodwaters, tearing the young family apart. Thriller, starring Jodie Comer, Joel Fry, Benedict Cumberbatch and Mark Strong

programme.title: RuPauls Drag Race UK vs the World
programme.desc: Comedian Jayde Adams is on hand to help as for one night only the queens form comedy double acts for RuPauls Fringe Festival. But who will have the last laugh? Amandaland star Lucy Punch joins RuPaul on the judging panel alongside Michelle Visage and Graham Norton as another queen sashays away

programme.title: Thailand: The Dark Side of Paradise
programme.desc: Zara McDermott discovers the dark side of Thailands backpacker culture. In the first episode, she lands in trouble with the Thai police when she starts to uncover the scale of Thailands illegal sex industry. A visit to the Bangkok Immigration Detention Centre exposes how easy it is to get caught on the wrong side of the law

programme.title: Thailand: The Dark Side of Paradise
programme.desc: Zara McDermott meets men chasing cheap thrills in Asias sex capital, Pattaya, and also talks to a local sex worker, who reveals the harsh reality of working in the illegal sex industry. She then heads to Ko Phangan, an exotic island famed for its spirituality and beauty. For Zara, this is paradise - but Lucio, a Brit who built a burgeoning cannabis business here while the drug was decriminalised, reveals that navigating the local law isnt always easy

programme.title: Thailand: The Dark Side of Paradise
programme.desc: Zara McDermott experiences Ko Phangans famous Full Moon Party, but beneath the cheap cocktails, music and fire shows, theres danger lurking as the medical team treat a possible drink-spiking victim. She then travels to Phuket and experiences a taste of Thailands luxury lifestyle. But she also learns how dream holidays can quickly go wrong, hearing the case of a British holiday-maker who died on the island - and whose family is still searching for answers

programme.title: Missing in Paradise: Searching for Sarm
programme.desc: Journalist Tir Dhondy investigates the disappearance of Sarm Heslop, who went missing from a luxury Caribbean charter yacht in 2021. Tire retraces Sarms last known movements and tracks down two boat captains whose vessels were moored near the yacht she vanished from. Also, she gets to question Ryan Banes, Sarms boyfriend, account of what happened what happened through his lawyer David Cattie

programme.title: Missing in Paradise: Searching for Sarm
programme.desc: Tir Dhondy meets with island police and is given CCTV footage that has never been released, showing Sarms last known movements with her boyfriend, Ryan Bane

programme.title: Missing in Paradise: Searching for Sarm
programme.desc: Tir Dhondy searches for the yacht Sarm vanished from, and tracks down Ryan Banes ex-wife, hearing first-hand about her experiences while married to him

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: Its Tommys birthday, but theres no time for cake. With just days to go before his long-awaited comeback fight in Budapest, Tommy is pulled in every direction - juggling press conferences, promo shoots and the pressure of proving hes still got what it takes in the ring

programme.title: Panorama
programme.sub-title: Will Robots Take My Job? - Panorama
programme.desc: Reporter Richard Bilton investigates the rise of automation in the workforce, questioning if it will bring freedom from toil or leave millions discarded and impoverished. In Silicon Valley, plans are underway for massive changes in employment, prompting fears that millions of people will be replaced by robots and AI

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: A cohort of junior doctors join the midwives on their district rounds, including Timothy Turner, while Violet turns her hand to midwifery

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two highest-scoring chefs from Scotland must go head-to-head and cook their six-course menus again. They need to impress a panel of exacting judges - chef Tom Kerridge, former Great British Menu Champion of Champions Lorna McNee, and comedian Phil Wang. The guest judge is Bafta-winning actress Katherine Parkinson. How will she judge dishes celebrating the British film industry? Only one of the chefs will triumph and go through to represent Scotland at the national finals. Andi Oliver presents

programme.title: The Zero Line: Inside Russias War
programme.desc: Russian soldiers and civilians share their experiences of the war with Ukraine, including accounts of torture and summary executions to ensure obedience, and extreme brutality by the police to crush dissent on the home front

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: The Piris are in the final of ta synchronised swimming competition and are beyond excited, but Pancake worries he will spoil their chances of glory with his two left flippers

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: Volcanic smoke blocks the three Proximan suns, which causes Big Lizard to become worryingly cold, but Cosima is on the case and comes up with a super-hot solution

programme.title: The Weasy Family
programme.desc: It is Weasys birthday and he is keen to find out if the ducklings have got him his dream present, but he keeps ruining their party preparations

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: A witch struggles to master her new wand, so Twinkle decides to have a go, only to make her friends vanish. She must now solo quest to find them

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The extraordinary animals from a tablet game come to life after the device explodes

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings decide to free a spirit and send it to Grizzy

programme.title: Game on Grandparents
programme.desc: Two teams are guided by pro-gamer Jelly as they play Samba de Amigo, trying to dance their way to victory

programme.title: Bros in Control
programme.desc: Callum transforms Adam and Joe into aliens, challenging them to take members of the public around in their UFO taxis and protect their backs from a Sharky-shaped storm

programme.title: Gladiators: Epic Pranks
programme.desc: Nitro hires a fake image guru and he and a producer tell Viper and Phantom they need new looks as a prancing unicorn and a lassoing cowboy

programme.title: Blue Peter
programme.desc: Packed full of amazing celeb guests, epic challenges and lols galore!

programme.title: Newsround
programme.desc: Current affairs reports aimed at a younger audience

programme.title: Gardeners World
programme.desc: Monty Don breathes new life into a tired agapanthus, pots up a fig tree for future harvests and shares a tip for growing roses. A retired GP shows Frances Tophill around his West Yorkshire garden, where prairie planting is the order of the day, Ashley Edwards explores the resilience of drought-resistant plants at RHS Hyde Hall and Arit Anderson visits the garden of two designers who have blended three distinct planting styles into one

programme.title: The Great Caruso (1951)
programme.desc: Biopic of the acclaimed Italian operatic tenor Enrico Caruso, charting his progress from humble beginnings as a choirboy in Naples, to his difficult rise to fame in America, as he struggles to find acceptance before ultimately being recognised as one of the worlds greatest singers. Starring Mario Lanza, Ann Blyth, Dorothy Kirsten and Jarmila Novotna

programme.title: Mary Berry - Love to Cook
programme.desc: The culinary expert offers tips for beginners, showing how to make recipes that will build confidence in the kitchen, including a Victoria sandwich, a mouthwatering stir fry, an open burger, and a biscuit for first-time bakers. In Newcastle, she meets the Mens Pie Club, a group set up to combat male social isolation and the members impress her with their spiced chicken and apricot tagine pie

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Four chefs compete for Scotland with canapes, starters and fish dishes inspired by the British film industry. The dishes are judged by Michelin-starred chef Adam Handling, and include a leek and potato veloute inspired by Trainspotting and an aubergine baba ganoush in honour of Limbo. Presented by Andi Oliver

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The Scottish chefs serve up their mains and desserts inspired by the British film industry, including venison loin smoked in gunpowder tea inspired by Skyfall and a frangipane custard tart in honour of Brave. Veteran judge Adam Handling helps to decide who deserves to say and who should go home. Presented by Andi Oliver

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Claire Rawle and James Lewis value antiques and collectibles at St Albans Cathedral and Abbey in Hertfordshire, while Paul Martin visits nearby Knebworth House

programme.title: The Bridge at Remagen (1969)
programme.desc: As Allied forces prepare for a major assault on Germany, a small unit of American soldiers is sent to capture a strategically important bridge over the Rhine - but German forces are determined to prevent the Allied advance, and seek to destroy it. Second World War adventure, starring George Segal, Robert Vaughn, Ben Gazzara and Bradford Dillman

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates this documentary following a couple of mountain lion families in Wyomings Rocky Mountains. The dramatic story of two mothers struggling to raise their cubs is giving scientists an invaluable insight into the behaviour of these elusive predators

programme.title: Jane Reas Bloomin Wild
programme.desc: The arrival of autumn sees Jane preparing for a Halloween gathering. She also harvests some ornamental gourds, which she turns into candle holders for her table, and shares some exciting news with her daughter. In Garvagh, Jane catches up with a friend and fellow farmers daughter, the Ulster-Scots writer and poet Anne McMaster

programme.title: Story and Song: 180 Years of Queens
programme.desc: A concert at the Whitla Hall in which the Ulster Orchestra mark the 180th anniversary of Queens University Belfast, with guest appearances by Alfie Boe, Declan ORourke, Dani Larkin, Soak and Robocobra Quartet, the Answer, Dana Masters, Jolene OHara and more

programme.title: Europe on the Edge with Katya Adler
programme.desc: The journalist finds out what the future holds for Europe in a world where it can no longer fully rely on America, beginning by visiting Italy and Germany to explore how theyre changing in a turbulent new world. In the Tuscan hills, she joins Italian paratroopers on a Nato exercise with 1,500 soldiers from seven different countries, then she heads to Germany, where she visits a Volkswagen car factory to learn how theyre being affected by both Russia and China. And in Germanys far south, not far from Munich, she meets a family who are building a house with a nuclear bunker

programme.title: One-Hit Wonders at the BBC: Volume 3
programme.desc: Another celebration of artists who lit up the charts exactly once before slipping mysteriously out of view, including Jennifer Paiges Crush, the 1998 hit that defined a summer, alongside the off-kilter charm of Jimmy the Hoovers Tantalise (Wo Wo Ee Yeh Yeh) from 1983. This instalment digs deeper into the vaults to unearth more unforgettable one-offs and near misses, reminding why the charts remain such a thrilling, unpredictable arena

programme.title: One-Hit Wonders at the BBC: Volume 2
programme.desc: A selection of archive performances of hits by artists who barely troubled the singles charts again, including appearances by the Las, the Mock Turtles, Joan Jett, Kim Carnes, Don Henley, Patti Smith, Curtis Mayfield and John Denver

programme.title: One-Hit Wonders at the BBC
programme.desc: Compilation of hits by artists that were hardly heard from again after one of their songs climbed to the pinnacle of pop, alongside an analysis of the one-hit wonder phenomenon. Featuring Peter Sarstedts 1969 track Where Do You Go To (My Lovely)?, Trios 1982 smash Da Da Da, Move Closer, by Phyllis Nelson, and You Get What You Give, by New Radicals

programme.title: Sound of Metal (2021)
programme.desc: Rock drummer Ruben Stone begins to lose his hearing and begrudgingly enrols in a residential programme for deaf recovering addicts run by a Vietnam War veteran. Oscar and Bafta-winning drama, starring Riz Ahmed, Olivia Cooke and Paul Raci

programme.title: Industry
programme.desc: Following Whitneys bold move in the US, Yasmin and Henry are left with the albatross Tender has become. Yasmin seizes the chance of a new opportunity, while Henry considers whether to challenge the status quo. Harper, Yasmin and Henry face a moment of reckoning

programme.title: Small Prophets
programme.desc: The prophets have to be buried in horse manure to make them grow, and Clive is at the end of his tether when a truckload of the stuff is dumped at the front of Michaels house, though Bev is intrigued and wants to be involved. When Kacey comes round to help bury the jars and asks Michael about the boxes hoarded in his house, he opens up about Clea and the life he once dreamed of

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two

programme.title: Kensukes Kingdom (2023)
programme.desc: A boy and his dog are washed overboard from their boat, leaving them stranded on a Pacific island. The youngster finds support from a fellow castaway, who helps him to protect the fragile home he has built for himself. Animated adventure based on Michael Morpurgos novel, featuring the voices of Aaron MacGregor, Sally Hawkins, Cillian Murphy, Raffey Cassidy and Ken Watanabe

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.sub-title: On the Eve of the Salmon Season: The River Tweed
programme.desc: Sammi Kinghorn and Matt Baker join the start of salmon fishing season on the River Tweed, meeting the people keeping traditions alive, the scientists monitoring the rivers health, and the rod-makers and tweed weavers hard at work behind the scenes. Plus, Tom Heap investigates a surge in illegal hare coursing thats left farmers in some areas fearing for their own safety

programme.title: My Kind of Town
programme.desc: Ian Hamilton heads to Fort William, the biggest town in the Highlands and the UKs self-styled outdoor capital. He heads up Ben Nevis to find out what the countryside has to offer, and speaks to the mountain rescue team about how they keep people safe. He also hears how the town is trying to reconnect with the shore of Loch Linnhe, for several decades cut off from the town by a trunk road, and learns how to swing a caman, or shinty stick, with the towns famous club

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two highest-scoring chefs from Scotland must go head-to-head and cook their six-course menus again. They need to impress a panel of exacting judges - chef Tom Kerridge, former Great British Menu Champion of Champions Lorna McNee, and comedian Phil Wang. The guest judge is Bafta-winning actress Katherine Parkinson. How will she judge dishes celebrating the British film industry? Only one of the chefs will triumph and go through to represent Scotland at the national finals. Andi Oliver presents

programme.title: Saturday Kitchen Best Bites
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt presents recipes from Richard Bainbridge, Julie Lin, Gaz Oakley and Shauna Froydenlund, while singer Alfie Boe faces his food heaven or hell

programme.title: The Life and Death of Colonel Blimp (1943)
programme.desc: A Home Guard officer serving during the Second World War is outraged by the disrespect for tradition shown by younger soldiers. He looks back on his military adventures during the Boer War and First World War, as well as his three great loves. Michael Powell and Emeric Pressburgers satirical drama, starring Roger Livesey, Deborah Kerr, Anton Walbrook and John Laurie

programme.title: Angels One Five (1953)
programme.desc: A new recruit joins a squadron of British fighter pilots in the summer of 1940, as they prepare to face a confrontation with the overwhelming forces of the Luftwaffe over the English Channel, while the ground crew at their base anxiously awaits reports from the conflict. Second World War adventure, starring Jack Hawkins and John Gregson

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: At Huddersfield Town Hall, West Yorkshire, Nick Davies is drawn to a bobbin holder that reveals the towns textile heritage, while Christina Trevanion finds an incredible collection of glass scent bottles. Presenter Paul Martin delves into the areas coal mining history

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: On the Isle of Lewis, Allys pride is at stake as he and son Noah prepare their ewes to take on mainland breeders at Dingwall show and market. The Glenns are hoping for good scanning results after a devastating loss of sheep in winter floods, while the pressure mounts as Lucy and Adam must negotiate an earlier completion date on the farm in Scotland, secure their finances and ensure the dairy herd is disease free

programme.title: Six Nations Rugby Special
programme.desc: Ugo Monye presents action from the fourth and penultimate round of fixtures, featuring Scotland v France at Scottish Gas Murrayfield, Ireland v Wales at Aviva Stadium, and Italy v England at Stadio Olimpico. The French faced arguably their toughest test yet in their bid to retain the title, while Ireland hosted a Wales side without a win so far, and Italy looked for a first-ever victory over an out-of-sorts England. With analysis from Sam Warburton and John Barclay

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Pitzhanger Manor in Ealing, west London, where finds include a quirky 18th-century Harlequinade childrens flip book, a vintage trainer collection, and a flying helmet from the Battle of Britain.Fiona also learns more about the science behind the recent restoration of the manor, and Serhat Ahmet challenges her to identify the uses for three rare pieces of porcelain

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7

For Pobe the cheetah, the pressure is on to provide for her family, but as one of the Okavangos underdogs, she must defend every meal from bigger cats. Leopard mum Lediba has no choice but to leave her cubs alone while she hunts, despite the sinister presence of an unknown male

programme.title: Forensics: The Real CSI

King of the Swamp Troy Landry, his sharpshooting son Chase, legendary gator hunter Bruce Mitchell, and big fish wrangler Zak Catchem join forces with professional snake hunter Bill Booth to dive deep into the underbelly of the Everglades to capture these sinister beasts. programme.desc: Rene has lukewarm results seeking profits in Stanton. Dusty finds a hoard of quality equipment, inking himself a decent payday. Looking for treasure, Brandi does end up with the green - just not in the way she expected

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Barry believes all the whales are coming to the big auction in Fullerton as he takes Dusty under his wing to test him. Rene makes some dainty discoveries, while Darrells tool locker becomes quite eye-opening

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The women outnumber the men in Rosamond, as Dusty and his girlfriend discover a stockpile of vintage TV memorabilia. Brandi enlists the help of Danielle and Lisa to dig for gold

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: As winter descends on Oak Island and clues continue to be uncovered, the fellowship makes a final bold effort to find the treasure before operations cease for the winter

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: Great mysteries that were once frozen in time, here focusing on secrets now revealed of prehistoric warfare

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: The lost legacy of the Donner Party, a group of nearly 90 emigrants who left Illinois in the spring of 1846, heading westward to California in covered wagons. Delayed by a multitude of mishaps, they spent the next winter snowbound in the Sierra Nevada, with some resortinf to cannibalism to survive

programme.title: Death Coast
programme.sub-title: Into the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: Jeff MacKinnons team battles thick kelp, brutal currents and a looming storm while searching Scatarie Islands coast. Just as the storm hits, they make a crucial discovery - a clue that could lead to the long-lost wrecks and hidden treasure

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Liners
programme.desc: The design, service and loss of the Achille Lauro, a ship which suffered two serious collisions, multiple onboard fires and was even hijacked by PLO terrorists in 1985

programme.title: Paranormal: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Documentary the most chilling and unexplainable paranormal activity footage captured by eyewitnesses

programme.title: Paranormal: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Documentary the most chilling and unexplainable paranormal activity footage captured by eyewitnesses

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Monster in the Attic, Houston UFO and Utah Bigfoot
programme.desc: An examination of several seemingly impossible things caught on film. This episode features a video showing a strange formation of flickering lights and a mysterious humanoid creature caught on camera in an abandoned attic

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Chupacabra, Greatest UFO Photo Ever and Mars Sounds
programme.desc: An examination of a recent caught-on-camera sighting of Chupacabra outside an Amarillo Zoo. Plus, whether a photograph taken over Costa Rica the greatest UFO picture ever taken

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Mystery Bird Monster, Ancient Alien Satellite and Behemoth of the Sea Bottom
programme.desc: A strange creature captured by a security camera in Youngstown, Ohio. The bizarre footage leaves residents and experts scratching their heads as they try to identify the mysterious beast. Plus, a strange, deafening sound that echoed across the entire Equatorial Pacific Ocean

programme.title: Irish Pickers
programme.desc: Ian and Butzy visit Mayo in the west of Ireland. They visit Mulranny, go fishing at Clew Bay and stop off at Swinford, before discovering something fascinating in Charlestown

programme.title: Irish Pickers
programme.desc: Ian arrives on his home turf of Dublin. After making a bit profit on an antique clock, he takes a trip to Waterford to bid on some of its world famous crystal

programme.title: Dickinsons Real Deal
programme.desc: David Dickinson helps members of the public in Welwyn Garden City sort the treasures from their trash, offering them the chance to put items up for auction or accept a cash sum

programme.title: Canadian Pickers
programme.desc: Skilled pickers hunt down objects with historical, collectible and pop culture value that have been long forgotten by their owners

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry, Allen and Guy finally take possession of the Buick Roadmaster they worked so hard to own. After a little tinkering they cruise down to a classic car show in Newbury, where they end up doing a little wheeling and dealing

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: The Way of the Gam Gam
programme.desc: While in Santa Ana, Lisa channels her grandmother, in trying to turn a profit. Brandi contends with a tremendously frustrating day, Darrell tries to make a meal out of a snack-sized locker, while Kenny learns to prep himself for true stealthiness

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Lisa comes to Montebello with a clear mind, intent on letting the lockers speak to her. Ivy lets his son navigate his way to a unit which turns out not to be completely vacant. Kenny is absolutely appalled by what he finds abandoned in his unit

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: After Seth rescinds his invasive search policies for his employees, the women to return to work. The leader soon wrestles with a new problem - profits are down, so he looks at creative ways to get new customers into the store

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: The staff receive complaints from customers that a staff member has been letting customers cut in line in exchange for a tip. They later find out that Anton, who works the pawn desk, is responsible

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Chum chases down a lead on a 1963 Fiat Microcar. Jake gets a lesson from big brother Corey when a rare musical instrument enters the shop. Rick and Corey disagree on a set of billiard balls

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: King of the Swamp Troy Landry gambles on Terrals secret honey hole, while Willie gives his son the reins for the first time and Ronnie baits with rotten duck

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion
programme.desc: Pickle must face her fear of big cats as she continues to impress Troy with her natural snake hunting talent. Bill and Tes stumble on a rumoured government testing facility and find all they can handle

programme.title: Canadian Pickers
programme.desc: Skilled pickers hunt down objects with historical, collectible and pop culture value that have been long forgotten by their owners

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy drags Isaiah to Victorville as punishment for getting Cs on his report card. Kenny wants to furnish his new house, but there are eight reasons standing in his way. Elsewhere, Lisa learns a lot

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi is fired up about expanding her brand in San Bernardino. Rene is positive that everyone is out to get him. Dusty tackles a locker dustier than him. Kenny is a mess

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and his partners in grime Allen Millyard and Guy Willison hit the road again in their relentless hunt for automotive treasures - this time they visit renowned collector Francis and secure a vintage Kawasaki at the National Motorcycle Museums autumn auction. They head to a mega auto-jumble at Kempton racecourse with over two thousand pounds worth of stock, but will their investments land them on the winners podium or will they finish as also-rans in the world of automotive trading?

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.desc: Rick and Chum encounter a rare pair of Pumas from 1968. Chum is then blown away by a fan from the 1940s. Later, Rick reads into a collection of letters from historical figures, but its some lab notes by Marie Curie that really leave him glowing
