programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: A bizarre trend happened in Ireland in the 1980s when thousands of people started seeing religious statues move. Some residents of a village reported seeing a statue of the Virgin Mary move. Others believed the phenomenon was just an optical illusion or a prank

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: According to folklore, pots of gold and wishes are granted if a Leprechaun is caught. These mysterious little creatures are seemingly only found in Ireland. Alleged sightings of leprechauns and fairies are nothing new in Ireland. In fact, many claim they are part of everyday life on the Emerald Isle. Experts debate whether these Celtic creatures are fact or fiction

programme.title: What on Earth?

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise and Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: A fresh look at the Third Reich from a global and current perspective, telling how the Nazis conquered Germany and then half of Europe within a few years of losing the First World War. This first episode recounts how the clash of right-wing and left-wing political convictions turned the Weimar Republic into a powder keg. The fascist movement then seized power in Italy in 1922

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Veterans and historians tell the story of the Thai-Burma railway and the countless prisoners of war and slave labourers who died building it

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: An analysis of ancient monuments, questioning what compelled man to move colossal stones long distances to assemble remarkably similar configurations in several locations around the world. programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Alien Files: Unsealed

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson travels along the north Norfolk coast through one of the least developed spots in Britain, finding out how the area maintained its rural, remote identity despite the dynamic industrial changes of the Victorian age. From the arrival of Bertie, Prince of Wales at Sandringham House to the opening of Cromer Pier, Tonys four-day walk sees him learn about key periods in the countys history. He explores prime shooting estates, purpose-built seaside resorts, salt marshes and disused railway lines as he discovers how powerful landowners were able to control development and even shape the railways to suit their needs

programme.title: Instruments of Death

programme.desc: Military combat specialists Karl Ude-Martinez and Kevin Hicks investigate the British uprising against the Roman army, examining how swords, spears and body armour were developed. Plus, how battlefield wounds were treated on the frontlines

programme.desc: After verifying a recent find on Lot 5 to be a sacred, religious artefact, the team drills through a surprising discovery deep in the Money Pit area

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers
programme.desc: The remarkable story of retired war gamer Gilbert Roberts, officer Jean Laidlaw and the Womens Royal Navy Service (WRNS) - aka the Wrens - as they use revolutionary war gaming tactics to defeat Admiral Karl Donitz and his Wolf Pack fleets of U-boats in the Battle of the Atlantic during the Second World War. The Second World War breaks out and a force of U-boats try to starve Britain into submission. Meanwhile, Vera Laughton Mathews recruits talented women into the WRNS. Narrated by Derek Jacobi

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers
programme.desc: After the fall of France in 1940, Donitzs most famous U-boat commanders embarked on a race to send British merchant ships to the bottom of the sea. Driven by a fierce competition to sink the highest tonnage, they terrorised the North Atlantic convoys and converged on them in wolfpack attacks. All the while, Vera Laughton Mathews Wrens worked around the clock to bring the battle directly to Donitzs U-boats. When confronted with unprecedented losses, and the real risk of starvation, the British Royal Navy seized on a manoeuvre developed by the famous U-boat hunter, Commander Johnny F Walker. Narrated by Derek Jacobi

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers
programme.desc: The story of the Womens Royal Naval Service (WRNS) who helped take down Germanys fearsome U-boats. Though the Admiralty was convinced the Allies had the expertise to defeat Germany, Gilbert Roberts and the Wrens started devising wargaming tactics to combat U-boat formations. Narrated by Derek Jacobi

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers
programme.desc: The story of Gilbert Roberts, Jean Laidlaw and the Womens Royal Navy Service (WRNS) - aka the Wrens - as they use revolutionary war gaming tactics to defeat Admiral Karl Donitz and his Wolf Pack fleets of U-boats in the Battle of the Atlantic during the Second World War. Roberts and Laidlaw uncovered a fatal flaw in the Royal Navys anti-U-boat strategy and developed their own countertactic. Their next task was winning over the Admiralty. Narrated by Derek Jacobi

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers
programme.desc: The remarkable story of Gilbert Roberts, Jean Laidlaw and the Womens Royal Navy Service (WRNS) - aka the Wrens. With the Allies at crisis point in 1943, pressure mounted on the Wrens to prove their worth and the stage was set for a battle that would turn the tide of the Atlantic war. Narrated by Derek Jacobi

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: The story of Britains first female agents sent to the front line during the Second World War and spymistress Vera Atkins, who led them. In the tumult of the conflict, French Resistance fighters sought aid from Britains Special Operations Executive (SOE) against Nazi occupation. Led by Romanian-born Atkins, SOE enlisted female agents including Odette Sansom and Noor Inayat Khan to take the fight to the Germans. As tensions soared, Noor navigated occupied France, while Atkins grappled with tough decisions. She and her team raced against time to safeguard SOEs mission, braving sacrifices for victory

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: The story of Britains first female agents sent to the front line during the Second World War and spymistress Vera Atkins, who led them. In the face of danger, Vera ramped up her recruitment of female agents. Chaos ensued as the Prosper circuit in Paris neared collapse. Meanwhile, Noor, deep in Parisian resistance, struggled to maintain cover. Vera enlisted agents like Violette Szabo and Yvonne Baseden, but uncertainty shrouds their upcoming missions

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: Amid the chaos of D-Day, alarming wireless messages revealed Special Operations Executive (SOE) disloyalty. While concerns escalated, Allied troops advanced and Paris was liberated. SOE operations subsequently dwindled, prompting Second World War spymistress Vera Atkins to confront the harm done to her agents

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: While Europe rejoiced over victory in the Second World War, Odette Hallowes struggle at Ravensbruck revealed telling information about other agents in prison. programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: Assigned to the British War Crime Investigation Unit in post-war Germany, British intelligence officer Vera Atkins pursued her agents fate at Natzweiler and Ravensbruck. Piecing together testimonies, she insisted on obtaining official records to substantiate her findings for upcoming trials. While Vera sought justice for her girls, a letter challenged her verdicts on Noor?s fate. Suspicions of double agents led Vera to hunt down a Nazi mastermind. She was still to determine whether any agents had escapeed, and if not who had betrayed them

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: How the capture of a key Nazi uncovered shocking realities. Amid demands for accountability, spymistress Vera Atkins and her team had to navigate murky waters to confront uncomfortable truths

programme.title: Queens of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: The great Cleopatra VII was not the only Egyptian queen to bear that name. This programme explores the shocking story of two other Cleopatras, who ruled Egypt jointly with Ptolemy VIII - a grim tale of incest, murder, rape, mutilation and war

programme.title: Queens of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: The untold story of Cleopatra Selene, the little-known daughter of Mark Antony and Cleopatra VII. After her parents suicide, Cleopatras daughter looked destined for death or obscurity. However, she recovered her fortunes to become one of Africas greatest queens

programme.title: Great British Castle Rescue
programme.desc: Rick Edwards takes an aerial and up-close view of some of the UKs most awe-inspiring castles. Beginning at Fyvie Castle in Scotland, Rick meets Annie Robertson, who faces the task of saving the childhood home of Charles I from collapse

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones heads to the south-east of England to explore the turbulent history of Dover Castle. He reveals that Henry II ordered its construction not only as a statement of royal power, but also out of guilt for the murder of Thomas Becket, the Archbishop of Canterbury, in 1170. Dan discovers how a vast network of tunnels was used to defend the castle, including underground barracks built during the Napoleonic Wars and a nuclear bunker created during the Cold War

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the turbulent history of the Tower of London, which is one of Britains most famous buildings and has been a military fortress, a palace, a royal mint, a prison, a zoo and a place of execution. He reveals how one kings obsession with money led to the Tower becoming the focus of the worst Jewish massacre the country had ever seen and explains how a mob of disgruntled peasants managed to break through its defences as they sought bloody revenge for taxes they could no longer put up with

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the history of Warwick Castle, which started as a motte and bailey fort established by William the Conqueror in 1068 and was transformed into a stone fortress two centuries later by the Beauchamp family. He examines the role Guy Beauchamp played in the kidnapping and murder of one of Edward IIs closest allies and descends into the castles claustrophobic dungeon

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones heads to Gwynedd to explore the history of Caernarfon Castle, the building of which began in 1283 on the orders of Edward I. He demonstrates how the castles vast stone walls and strategically designed towers repelled all enemies, even the Welsh national hero Owain Glyndwr, earning itself a truly forbidding reputation, but its military importance faded at the end of the 15th century when Henry Tudor - a Welshman - made his way on to the English throne

programme.desc: While koalas may seem lazy, their behaviour drastically changes during mating season. As the season of love begins, the documentary follows two males on a mission to mate

programme.title: Wild Family Ties
programme.desc: Following animal protagonists as they fall in love, build families and take care of their little ones and comparing their relationships to those in humans

programme.title: Wild Family Ties
programme.desc: Exploring what it is like to be a parent in the animal kingdom

programme.title: Extraordinary Animals
programme.desc: A look at some of the animals that take a playful approach to surviving Australia

programme.title: Extraordinary Animals
programme.desc: A look at some of Australias most sinister animals and the clever means of survival that lie behind each of these creatures sinister traits

programme.title: My Best Friends an Animal
programme.desc: Cameras check in on Elsa the sloth with Pedro, who has dedicated his life to her care after a fall left her paralysed

programme.title: Shark: British Isles Special with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Naturalist Steve Backshall goes in search of some of the 30-plus shark species that inhabit waters of the British Isles, showing how the big fish in home waters are just as astonishing and mysterious as their global cousins. Along the way he encounters a four-ton basking shark near the Hebrides and dives with his favourite of all time, the blue shark, off the coast of Cornwall. He also meets scientists and conservationists in Wales who are working to protect endangered species

programme.title: Deep in the Heart
programme.desc: A celebration of Texan wildlife, showing the world through the eyes of catfish, ocelots and other native creatures and discovering how conservation efforts can save habitats. Narrated by Matthew McConaughey

programme.title: Irelands Wild Islands with Eoin Warner
programme.desc: A journey through Irelands Atlantic islands. This edition focuses on winter and early spring on the west coast, where red deer battle on windswept Inishvickillane

programme.title: Irelands Wild Islands with Eoin Warner
programme.desc: The wildlife presenter wanders in Clares magical woods and witnesses hundreds of basking sharks engaged in a mating display

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Rise of Animals
programme.sub-title: From the Seas to the Skies
programme.desc: Part one of two. The naturalist explores the evolution of vertebrates over the past 500 million years, beginning with a look at how remarkable advances allowed primitive fish to make the radical move on to land, and then take to the skies with the advent of flight. He uses fossils of both ancient and living species combined with CGI and film to chart their journey out of the water to populate all corners of the globe

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Rise of Animals
programme.desc: The naturalist concludes his two-part exploration of the evolution of vertebrates over the past 500 million years by looking at the history of mammals. He traces their journey from humble origins as tiny nocturnal forest-dwellers to their astonishing explosion in diversity and domination of the world following the death of the dinosaurs

programme.title: Pride Rules
programme.desc: A look at lion prides, witnessing births, deaths and battles galore as the Waterfront Pride fights to maintain control over the banks of Botswanas Chobe River

programme.title: Super Shark Highway
programme.desc: The southern team test new migration tech, while the northern team catch and tag bull sharks in a bid to help local swimmers

programme.title: Carpathian Predators
programme.desc: The Carpathian Mountains stretch across seven European countries. Vast primeval forests, steep gorges and isolated peaks offer a vital refuge to some of the continents most charismatic creatures. The opening instalment of this two-part documentary takes place in the summer months. A mother brown bear struggles to find food for her two cubs before the winter arrives. A pair of lynx kittens venture away from their den and honeybees pollinate flowers

programme.title: Carpathian Predators
programme.desc: Part two of two. The role played by one of the most misunderstood creatures of the Carpathian mountains - the Eurasian wolf

programme.title: Pride Rules
programme.desc: A look at lion prides, witnessing births, deaths and battles galore as the Waterfront Pride fights to maintain control over the banks of Botswanas Chobe River

programme.title: Super Shark Highway
programme.desc: The southern team test new migration tech, while the northern team catch and tag bull sharks in a bid to help local swimmers

programme.title: Wild Fighters
programme.desc: An investigation into the different reasons that lead animals to fight, from power and territory to family and food - beginning with the most basic of instincts - the fight for life

programme.title: Wild Fighters
programme.desc: The documentary reveals how, for species that live in packs or pods, the survival of each individual is tied to the success of the group

programme.title: Waterworld Africa
programme.desc: Following the wildlife of a South African mangrove forest through the changing seasons, meeting the red-claw mangrove crabs that keep the forest clean

programme.title: Waterworld Africa
programme.sub-title: Okavango: The Lifeblood of the Kalahari
programme.desc: A look at the Okavango Delta, one of Africas most abundant and diverse wildlife areas

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: The deadly world of snake catching Down Under, where even the smallest mistake could have lethal consequences. Adele and Mick go up against an eastern brown, the second deadliest snake in the world, while Stuart and Olivia tangle with a carpet python

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Stuart and Olivia intercept two male brown snakes duelling for mating rights at a construction site

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Diving into tight spaces, underneath hot houses and into tense rescue situations as the catchers confront a six-foot-long, highly venomous brown snake

programme.desc: A young boys trip to the toilet is interrupted by a snake hiding under the toilet rolls and Stuart faces off against an old foe

programme.desc: Surf life savers call the team for help after finding a red bellied black snake in their board room. Stuart and Oliva attempt to remove three pythons from a building site

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: The naturalist and film-maker explores the many varieties of plant life housed at the Royal Botanic Gardens in Kew, west London, and explains what they reveal about the natural world and the development of life on Earth. He begins inside the establishments Palm House, whose climate has been engineered to simulate conditions found in rainforests, charting the evolution of plants that grow in the worlds wettest regions and investigating how flowering plants spread across the globe so rapidly

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: The naturalist explores how the plants at Kew Gardens change through the seasons and demonstrates the surprising properties of several species, including the predatory pond-dwelling bladderwort utricularia and a fungus that appears to be capable of mind control. He also discusses the largest single organism on the planet, visits the worlds biggest flower and explains how plants and insects can communicate using scents and music

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: The naturalist concludes his exploration of the Royal Botanic Gardens in Kew, west London, by examining plants that have evolved to minimise their dependence on water, enabling them to survive in the worlds driest environments. He witnesses a cactus blooming at midnight, tells the story of the spectacular flowering of the Agave franzosinii, and visits the Millennium Seed Bank, a facility designed to save plants from future extinction

programme.desc: A lonely boy, neglected by his father and bullied at school, finds comfort in a mysterious book about a young heros quest to save his world from destruction. Fantasy adventure based on Michael Endes novel, starring Barret Oliver, Noah Hathaway, Gerald McRaney, Moses Gunn and Patricia Hayes

programme.desc: Harold and pals Moose and Porcupine live in a hand-drawn world of limitless possibilities. The trio become concerned when the Old Man, who narrates their illustrated existence, suddenly falls silent. Using his magical crayon, Harold draws a door to the real world and tumbles into the present day as a flesh-and-blood man, who collides head-on with widow Terry and her young son, Mel. Family adventure, starring Zachary Levi, Lil Rel Howery, Zooey Deschanel and Benjamin Bottani

programme.title: Little Women (1994)
programme.desc: Four sisters are raised by their strong-willed mother while their father is away fighting in the American Civil War. Although one yearns to become a writer and another dreams of being married, the girls remain firmly united as the family steers a course through hard times and tragic events. Period drama, based on Louisa May Alcotts novel, with Winona Ryder, Susan Sarandon, Claire Danes, Samantha Mathis and Kirsten Dunst

programme.title: The United States Vs. Billie Holiday (2021)
programme.desc: The acclaimed singer is targeted by the Federal Department of Narcotics with an undercover sting operation led by Federal Agent Jimmy Fletcher, with who she had a tumultuous affair. Director Lee Daniels biopic based on the novel by Johann Hari, starring Andra Day, Trevante Rhodes and Natasha Lyonne

programme.title: Miss Congeniality (2000)
programme.desc: A feminist FBI agent is sent undercover as a contestant in the Miss United States pageant when the event becomes the target of a terrorist bomb threat. Comedy, starring Sandra Bullock, Michael Caine, Benjamin Bratt, Candice Bergen and William Shatner

Fact-based drama, starring Kate Winslet, Andy Samberg, Alexander Skarsgard and Marion Cotillard

Director Patty Jenkins blockbusting fantasy adventure, starring Gal Gadot, Chris Pine and David Thewlis

Director Emerald Fennells Oscar-winning crime thriller, starring Carey Mulligan, Bo Burnham and Alison Brie

Goren also pays a visit to old friend and mythology lecturer Cleo Andrews for expert advice. Guest starring Cynthia Nixon and Patti Smith

It emerges they believed the companys owner Danielle Magee had stolen their business idea after they employed her as a programmer and had filed a lawsuit against her. Crime drama, starring Kathryn Erbe and Vincent DOnofrio

All are accompanied by the National Symphony Orchestra, conducted by David Brophy. Hosted by Tommy Tiernan.

programme.title: Grand Tours of Scotland
programme.sub-title: In Search of the Real Scotland
programme.desc: Paul Murton boards the Jacobite steam train to make one of the worlds most famous railways journeys, with his route starting at the foot of Ben Nevis in Fort William and continuing along to Mallaig and onwards to the Isle of Skye. For centuries, outsiders had seldom visited the beautiful landscape of the west coast, but then the power of steam changed everything and within a century, a network of railways spread across the entire country, connecting the industrial cities of the south to the mountains and glens of the north

programme.title: Love Your Garden

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and the team head to Chessington to create a car-themed garden for hospital worker and automobile fan Alan Rendall. To recognise his bravery, Alan and the team surprise the whole Rendall family and turn their featureless plot into an automobile-inspired haven

programme.desc: Newlywed couple Tessa and Robin juggle running a 48-bedroom castle and 50 acres of land with a special pair of Royal Highlander cows. Silver enthusiast Oliver desperately hopes that a late 19th-century Japanese silver punchbowl will be coming home with him, while auctioneer Michael needs to sell a 1930s Philco radio that props-buyer Bridie and her mother Sara have fallen in love with

programme.title: Country House Auction
programme.desc: Egyptologist Dr Chris gets his hands on an inscribed Egyptian amulet and gives trainee auctioneer James a masterclass in ancient signs and symbols. programme.title: Mike

programme.desc: The chef continues his journey through Croatia and savours the native oysters of Ston, before crossing the border into Albania, where he is joined by his son Jack and the pair sample local dishes such as chicken jufka and kokoretsi. In his own kitchen on the Greek island of Symi, Rick cooks traditional Albanian dishes, including Lepur Comlek and Tave Kosi

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, James May and Richard Hammond travel to Africa, where they are challenged to buy a second-hand car costing less than £1,500 and in no way designed to go off-road, and drive across Botswana. Along the way they must negotiate salt pans, rivers and reserves full of animals while facing sweltering heat and suffocating dust

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May find three small cars at an affordable price - a task that involves pestering bankers, harnessing large dogs and almost getting arrested. James meets American rally driver Ken Block, and Jeremy tests out the Mercedes SL Black. Comedian Michael McIntyre is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Twenty Twelve co-stars Hugh Bonneville and Jessica Hynes pair up again to go on a road trip through the former Soviet republic of Georgia. Driving from the border with Azerbaijan to the Black Sea, Jessica soon discovers her spirit of adventure is causing Hugh a few moments of high anxiety, but there is worse to come when they find themselves stuck on a high mountain pass in bad weather and he has to overcome his vertigo. While the drive is a challenge all the way, the country and its people delight and surprise them at every turn

programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Comedians Phill Jupitus and Marcus Brigstocke head to Bolivia for a high-altitude trip, first driving along the infamous Road of Death, only to find themselves deep in bandit country. Disorientation takes them by surprise as they have to navigate Salar de Uyuni - a salt lake so vast that Buzz Aldrin could see it from space. Their goal is the ancient mountain city of Potosi, whose silver mines financed the Spanish empire in the 16th century and which is almost 5,000 metres above sea level

programme.title: Motorhoming with Merton and Webster
programme.desc: Paul Merton and his wife Suki Webster are in the Lake District, the first time they have had a holiday there. Their first destination is Kendal, but first they have to negotiate their motorhome under a low bridge. Later they go to the Kendal mint cake factory, and after crossing Windermere by ferry from Bowness, they head to a beautiful campsite on Coniston Water

programme.title: Turkey with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: In the second half of the journey, Simon travels along the Black Sea Coast to the capital of Ankara and the Northern Highlands, witnessing first hand the aftermath of fighting in Kurdish areas and meeting a conservationist attempting to preserve the regions brown bears. He then returns to Istanbul, where he takes part in a popular TV series set in the palace of the Ottoman Sultans

programme.title: Cornwall with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The first of two programmes in which the explorer travels through Cornwall as its emerges from the first lockdown, discovering the impact of Covid-19 on a part of the country highly reliant on tourism. Simon discovers the ongoing impact of the collapse of the tin-mining industry in the 1980s when he visits one of Britains poorest estates, and meets the entrepreneurs who sell homemade food on the beach who are struggling to make enough money to last the winter

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: Documentary series following the investigations of unique specialist units within UK police forces created to crack tough cases ranging from cyber heists, romance fraud and people trafficking to drug rings and murder. The night before Valentines Day, 2022, Thames Valley Police receive a 999 call reporting that someone has been attacked close to Banbury town centre - officers are dispatched and find that the victim is 40-year-old Keith Green, who is pronounced dead at the scene and an armed arrest unit conducts an immediate raid on two potentially dangerous suspects. With a possible murder on their doorstep, Thames Valley Major Crime Unit launch Operation Inuit and begin an intense investigation that unravels a love triangle and a killing motivated by twisted passion and male pride

programme.title: Mike
programme.desc: Biopic chroniclling the rise and fall of former heavyweight boxing champion Mike Tyson inside and out of the ring, starting with his humble beginnings in Brooklyn under a domineering mother. Starring Trevante Rhodes

programme.desc: Trainer Cus DAmato attempts to teach 13-year-old Mike how to become the youngest heavyweight champion of all time by giving him discipline, extremely honed skills, and an ego. Boxing biopic, starring Trevante Rhodes

programme.title: Mike

programme.title: Mike

In his own kitchen on the Greek island of Symi, Rick cooks traditional Albanian dishes, including Lepur Comlek and Tave Kosi

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, James May and Richard Hammond travel to Africa, where they are challenged to buy a second-hand car costing less than £1,500 and in no way designed to go off-road, and drive across Botswana. Along the way they must negotiate salt pans, rivers and reserves full of animals while facing sweltering heat and suffocating dust

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May find three small cars at an affordable price - a task that involves pestering bankers, harnessing large dogs and almost getting arrested. James meets American rally driver Ken Block, and Jeremy tests out the Mercedes SL Black. Comedian Michael McIntyre is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Twenty Twelve co-stars Hugh Bonneville and Jessica Hynes pair up again to go on a road trip through the former Soviet republic of Georgia. Driving from the border with Azerbaijan to the Black Sea, Jessica soon discovers her spirit of adventure is causing Hugh a few moments of high anxiety, but there is worse to come when they find themselves stuck on a high mountain pass in bad weather and he has to overcome his vertigo. While the drive is a challenge all the way, the country and its people delight and surprise them at every turn

programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Comedians Phill Jupitus and Marcus Brigstocke head to Bolivia for a high-altitude trip, first driving along the infamous Road of Death, only to find themselves deep in bandit country. Disorientation takes them by surprise as they have to navigate Salar de Uyuni - a salt lake so vast that Buzz Aldrin could see it from space. Their goal is the ancient mountain city of Potosi, whose silver mines financed the Spanish empire in the 16th century and which is almost 5,000 metres above sea level

programme.title: Motorhoming with Merton and Webster
programme.desc: Paul Merton and his wife Suki Webster are in the Lake District, the first time they have had a holiday there. Their first destination is Kendal, but first they have to negotiate their motorhome under a low bridge. Later they go to the Kendal mint cake factory, and after crossing Windermere by ferry from Bowness, they head to a beautiful campsite on Coniston Water

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: An unknown tagger begins to paint graffiti around London, and claims to have been responsible for killing a celebrated street artist four years previously. Originally part of a gang, the victim went solo after receiving support from a wealthy art patron, and when the detectives reopen the case, they become suspicious of his resentful former crew members. Meanwhile, Brian signs up to a social networking site as TopCop999 to chart the gritty life of a lawman, much to his colleagues displeasure

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: When a retrospective exhibition of murdered fashion designer Ritchie Levenes work opens, the team is prompted to re-examine the three-year-old crime. The detectives learn about his tempestuous relationships with his new spouse, personal assistant and ex-wife Sarah, who believes his brother Adrian is the killer because he had the most to gain from his death. Meanwhile, Gerry enlists Emily to help update his image, although not everyone is impressed with the results. Crime drama, guest starring Rupert Graves and Hannah Waterman

programme.title: Jonathan Creek
programme.desc: Chinese gangsters threaten to murder a High Court judge, prompting a major security operation at his home. Despite a wall of police protection, however, he is fatally stabbed through the heart in his own bedroom and Creek believes a clock and a local pub hold the key to the mystery. Drama, starring Alan Davies and Caroline Quentin

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club
programme.desc: When a man with no ID and no connection to Marlow is found dead in the middle of a suburban road, Judith, Becks and Suzie delve into secrets between the residents

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club
programme.desc: A surprising link to a past missing persons case shines a new light on the residents of Linnet Close - but could they be responsible for murder on their doorstep?

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: When a local nun is strangled to death on her way to the chapel, the team find investigating the murder to be a real challenge after they learn that the members of her order have taken a vow of silence

programme.title: Whitechapel
programme.desc: Part two of two. Another torso is washed up from the Thames, this time at Putney Bridge, and Llewellyn finds traces of Spanish Fly, an aphrodisiac used by the infamous Marquis de Sade. The discovery propels Miles and the team into a world of dark obsessions, where romance and love take a sinister turn. Crime thriller, starring Rupert Penry-Jones, Phil Davis and Claire Rushbrook

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The Lynleys are looking forward to becoming parents, but Helen succumbs to temptation and dabbles in her husbands latest case. However, her past involvement with the victim unwittingly puts her in the firing line, with devastating consequences for everyone. Jemma Redgrave and Barbara Flynn guest star, with Nathaniel Parker, Sharon Small and Lesley Vickerage

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: An unknown tagger begins to paint graffiti around London, and claims to have been responsible for killing a celebrated street artist four years previously. Originally part of a gang, the victim went solo after receiving support from a wealthy art patron, and when the detectives reopen the case, they become suspicious of his resentful former crew members. Meanwhile, Brian signs up to a social networking site as TopCop999 to chart the gritty life of a lawman, much to his colleagues displeasure

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: Top television spy series Operation QT is filming at the convent when a real bullet is fired instead of a replica, narrowly missing the leading actor. Working with DS Livingstone, Sister Boniface soon works out the real target was the shows producer, Dick Lansky, who has many enemies on and off set and a roving eye for the actresses. Lorna Watson stars

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: As the bills pile up, Tracey has to consider selling Darryls car, while Sharon goes into the perfume business to raise some cash. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: Queens of Mystery
programme.desc: Part one of two. When 1980s new wave band Volcanic Youth get together to record an album at a retreat not far from Wildermarsh, Cat is troubled due to her contentious break-up with the group years ago. Mattie is assigned the unglamorous job of searching for a lost dog, but the case is put on hold when one of the bands members turns up dead

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Part two of two. Garfield is determined to resolve where he stands with Jenny, and Quinnans strange actions arouse the suspicion of his colleagues

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: The stakes are high when Meadows goes undercover in a casino

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: When a plane makes a crash landing in Sun Hill, Dalys former lover looms large in the subsequent investigation

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: A teenage girl claiming to have information regarding a mans violent death turns out to be Sergeant Boydens estranged daughter. Investigations prompt a thaw in their icy relationship, but there are more surprises in store for Sun Hills Mr Smooth. Tony OCallaghan and Sasha Pick star

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Skases pride takes a blow when he is abducted and robbed by a gang of teenage girls

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: The nuns and midwives return home after their trip to South Africa, to find Nonnatus House has come under new management. The formidable Sister Ursula (Harriet Walter) has taken charge and introduced some drastic changes to the way the clinic is run, which Sister Julienne, bound by her vow of obedience, is powerless to oppose. The midwives come to the aid of a victim of domestic violence whose husband is about to be released from prison, and who risks losing everything if she seeks a divorce. Sister Mary Cynthia suffers further anxiety attacks, and Patsy receives distressing news about her father

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Sister Ursula insists the midwives do not become emotionally involved with their patients, but her harsh new approach proves hard to cope with in the face of two devastating cases. A father-to-be is badly injured in an explosion, leaving him unable to work to support his family, and a couple with dwarfism expecting their first child are warned that their child may be stillborn, a situation that leaves Patsy confronted with one of the hardest decisions of her life

programme.title: Catherine Cooksons Colour Blind
programme.desc: Drama from the best-selling author. Set between the wars, it concerns a girl who returns to her Tyneside home newly married to her black husband, only to encounter bigotry from all sides, to say nothing of her obsessed brothers animosity. Niamh Cusack, Tony Armatrading and Dearbhla Molloy star

programme.title: North and South
programme.desc: Four-part adaptation of Elizabeth Gaskells novel following the fortunes of Margaret Hale, a privileged middle-class southerner who is forced to settle in the northern town of Milton. Over time she grows accustomed to her new surroundings and her social conscience awakens as she befriends local mill workers, and discovers the poverty and workplace struggles they face. Daniela Denby-Ashe, Lesley Manville and Sinead Cusack star

programme.title: North and South
programme.desc: Thorntons family questions Margarets intentions when she intervenes in an industrial dispute at the mill. Marias health continues to deteriorate, and desperate to see her son Frederick one last time, she pens a letter to him in Spain, begging for his return. Drama based on the novel by Elizabeth Gaskell, starring Daniela Denby-Ashe and Richard Armitage

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: As Great Slaughters Quincentennial Celebrations near, Sister Helena is found dead in the chapel having been bludgeoned over the head

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Double bill. A rising star in the Essex police force is found beaten and shot in his burnt-out car in what proves to be an emotional case for his colleagues. The team helps DCI Jim Sullivan, the detective charged with bringing the killer to justice, and it isnt long before suspicion falls on Dean Fallon - a local drug dealer and the son of a known crime boss. But when he proves to have a solid alibi, the investigation shifts closer to home. Starring Emilia Fox and David Caves, with James Alexandrou and Jason Watkins

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Jack is approached by an old friend who has discovered a diamond worth millions in the flat of a man who died more than 20 years ago. It transpires the precious stone was stolen in a safety deposit box heist, but the dead mans passport shows he was out of the country when the crime was committed. Delving deeper into his past, the team discovers some well-concealed secrets - including a daughter whos still unaware of her true parentage

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: The nuns and midwives return home after their trip to South Africa, to find Nonnatus House has come under new management. The formidable Sister Ursula (Harriet Walter) has taken charge and introduced some drastic changes to the way the clinic is run, which Sister Julienne, bound by her vow of obedience, is powerless to oppose. The midwives come to the aid of a victim of domestic violence whose husband is about to be released from prison, and who risks losing everything if she seeks a divorce. Sister Mary Cynthia suffers further anxiety attacks, and Patsy receives distressing news about her father

programme.title: A Small Light
programme.desc: With Amsterdam almost empty of Jews, Miep and Jan do what they can to save the last remaining ones. Meanwhile, news of the Normandy landings arrives

programme.title: Art Detectives
programme.desc: DI Mick Palmer, sole member of the Heritage Crime Unit, is dispatched to the imposing Astleigh House in Yorkshire, where art historian Francis Crozier has been murdered

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharons husband Chris becomes seriously ill, leaving her facing a difficult decision. Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph star in an episode featuring an early screen appearance by Doon Mackichan

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Carvers self-interest and hard drinking finally cause him to go too far

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Joe bids farewell to the Mill and Letherbridge. Ronnie discovers a hidden crime when a teenage boy tries to hire his services, and later shares a positive counselling session with George. Medical drama, starring Stephen Boxer, Sean Gleeson and Stirling Gallacher

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Archie is enlisted to help save a mans life when a cleaner overhears her bosss murderous plans. At the Mill, Joes presence is sorely missed after he has left for America, while Jimmi goes to the police station to meet an old acquaintance

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Tom tries to work his way back up the career ladder by landing the post of consultant, while Kath also hopes to secure a new job as clinical matron, but doesnt realise Chrissie has applied for the same position. Ed decides to postpone his exams, unable to concentrate because of his growing concern for his father, and Lisa feels she is no longer one of the girls after being forced to reproach Jess and Donna, although a drink with Owen soon cheers her up. Former Coronation Street actor Chris Bisson guest stars

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Part one of two. Hasina Haque joins the cast as nurse Mads, who struggles to understand the stronger regional accents of her colleagues in her first job since leaving Pakistan, with serious repercussions. Two patients are admitted separately after being shot with ball bearings fired from an air rifle, and an incident at Holby College brings terror into the heart of the fully stretched ED. Guest starring Michelle Collins (Coronation Street), and featuring an appearance by Holby City actress Jaye Jacobs

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Carvers self-interest and hard drinking finally cause him to go too far

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Ronnie begins to fold under the pressure of the police investigation whilst Jack is torn between a rock and a hard place. Dot and Jims anniversary party comes to an abrupt end

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Dot struggles to come to terms with Dottys behaviour. Marsdens investigation hots up and the suspects begin to feel the pressure. Meanwhile, Ricky questions Biancas loyalty

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: The Herriots give Highland dancing a fling, while Siegfried catches fleas and a stag disappears. Rural drama, starring Christopher Timothy, Lynda Bellingham and Robert Hardy

programme.title: Howards Way
programme.desc: Jacks life hangs in the balance as he is rushed to hospital on the Barracuda. Meanwhile, Kens crafty ways backfire on him when he finds himself a victim of blackmail

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: Tracking a local conman, Frank and Lu make some unlikely allies when they encounter a pair of deadly gangsters. Mark Benton and Jo Joyner star in the comedy drama about an oddball couple of private detectives who investigate crime in Stratford-upon-Avon

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sisters Sharon and Traceys lives are changed for ever when their husbands leave for work and never return. First episode of the popular comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Truly spots a bottle with a message inside floating down the river, and decides to catch it - so enlists the help of Clegg, Billy and Alvin to follow its elusive course and eventually read the mysterious contents. Long-running comedy, starring Frank Thornton, Peter Sallis, Keith Clifford and Brian Murphy

programme.desc: Daphne gets some advice from her old nanny - but it could be a little too late - and Sam declares his stuffing days are over. Starring Angela Thorne, Michael Elphick, Lysette Anthony and Ray Burdis

programme.title: The Lakes with Paul Rose
programme.desc: Remote Eskdale is the next destination in the explorers trek through the Lake District, enjoying the landscapes and meeting its people. The corner of the western Lakes he focuses on is off the normal tourist track, yet boasts Englands highest mountain. However, before making the tough climb to the summit of Scafell Pike, Paul meets the folk who run one of the countrys most scenic railways, has a close encounter with a vulture, and gets to grips with the locals in a spot of Cumberland wrestling

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: The naturalist leads an expedition into an unexplored desert canyon in the Jebel Akhdar mountain range of Oman. With temperatures soaring, dehydration and heat stroke are a constant threat

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve and a team of kayakers head to the Himalayas to attempt to row down the last great unexplored river in Bhutan. But theres a reason it has never been attempted before - it runs through a steep gorge which, according to legend, drops off the face of the planet

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve and an elite team of rock climbers head to the desert of southern Oman to attempt the first ascent of a towering escarpment, hoping to discover the rare and elusive Arabian leopard

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve and the team battle through the jungle into the heart of Indonesian Borneo. They are on their way to meet experts who have discovered ancient cave art thought to be among the oldest on the planet. But they have also heard rumours that the mountain range contains further unmapped caves - and Steve wants to be the first to track them down, and whatever is hidden within

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond takes a look at the BMW 6 Series cabriolet, and Jeremy Clarkson explores whether the VW Golf GTI has gone back to its roots. There is an investigation to see if it is possible to purchase a Porsche for a snip, and Cliff Richard is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson does his bit for the environment when he test drives the Toyota Prius, a hybrid car powered by petrol and electricity. The team awards the dubious accolade for the worst-handling car and a Mitsubishi Evo VIII faces a tough challenge when it goes head to head with a Lamborghini Murcielago. The Who frontman Roger Daltrey is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.desc: Angies career takes off - leaving unemployed Nick at home and feeling at a loose end. Daphne is in need of support as Giles receives a three-month prison sentence. Comedy, starring Michael Elphick, Angela Thorne and Lysette Anthony

programme.title: Three Up, Two Down
programme.desc: Giles decides upon an extreme course of action to win back Daphne, while Angie jets off to the Seychelles on a modelling assignment

programme.title: Three Up, Two Down
programme.desc: Daphnes worst fears come true when a trip to the coast finds her all at sea with Sam. Comedy, starring Angela Thorne and Michael Elphick

programme.title: Three Up, Two Down
programme.desc: Daphne gets some advice from her old nanny - but it could be a little too late - and Sam declares his stuffing days are over. Starring Angela Thorne, Michael Elphick, Lysette Anthony and Ray Burdis

programme.title: The Lakes with Paul Rose
programme.desc: Remote Eskdale is the next destination in the explorers trek through the Lake District, enjoying the landscapes and meeting its people. The corner of the western Lakes he focuses on is off the normal tourist track, yet boasts Englands highest mountain. However, before making the tough climb to the summit of Scafell Pike, Paul meets the folk who run one of the countrys most scenic railways, has a close encounter with a vulture, and gets to grips with the locals in a spot of Cumberland wrestling

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: The naturalist leads an expedition into an unexplored desert canyon in the Jebel Akhdar mountain range of Oman. With temperatures soaring, dehydration and heat stroke are a constant threat

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve and a team of kayakers head to the Himalayas to attempt to row down the last great unexplored river in Bhutan. But theres a reason it has never been attempted before - it runs through a steep gorge which, according to legend, drops off the face of the planet

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve and an elite team of rock climbers head to the desert of southern Oman to attempt the first ascent of a towering escarpment, hoping to discover the rare and elusive Arabian leopard

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve and the team battle through the jungle into the heart of Indonesian Borneo. They are on their way to meet experts who have discovered ancient cave art thought to be among the oldest on the planet. But they have also heard rumours that the mountain range contains further unmapped caves - and Steve wants to be the first to track them down, and whatever is hidden within

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond takes a look at the BMW 6 Series cabriolet, and Jeremy Clarkson explores whether the VW Golf GTI has gone back to its roots. There is an investigation to see if it is possible to purchase a Porsche for a snip, and Cliff Richard is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson does his bit for the environment when he test drives the Toyota Prius, a hybrid car powered by petrol and electricity. The team awards the dubious accolade for the worst-handling car and a Mitsubishi Evo VIII faces a tough challenge when it goes head to head with a Lamborghini Murcielago. The Who frontman Roger Daltrey is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson heads from London to the ski slopes of Verbier in a Ferrari 612 Scaglietti, in the hope of beating James May and Richard Hammond, who undertake the journey by air. programme.title: The Royle Family
programme.desc: Denise is avoiding actually doing anything for Baby David, so its Cheryl who goes upstairs when his cries on the baby-monitor get too loud to be ignored

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!
programme.desc: In a bid to liven up the camp, Joe Maplin decrees a weekly Sunshine Smile Day - giving perennial wide-boy Ted the perfect opportunity to fleece unsuspecting holiday-makers out of their spare cash. Comedy, starring Paul Shane

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.sub-title: The Long Legs of the Law
programme.desc: Rodney starts going out with a policewoman, much to the consternation of dodgy dealer Del-Boy, who is terrified that one wrong word from his little brother could see him banged up for five years. Vintage comedy, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst, David Jason and Lennard Pearce

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del gets the chance to sell off a couple of antique urns - the only problem being that one of them contains the ashes of Triggers late grandfather. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst, Lennard Pearce and Roger Lloyd Pack

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del takes up cards in his latest bid to make his first million - much to the annoyance of Rodney and Grandad, who reckon he will end up gambling away all their worldly goods. Comedy with the wheeler-dealing Trotter family, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Lennard Pearce

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del-Boy cannot believe his ears when Rodney tells him he has found a girlfriend. The trouble is, the woman is old enough to be his mother - and to make matters worse, her husband is about to be released from prison

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del jumps at the opportunity to decorate the local Chinese restaurant to make a quick profit, and the results are outstanding in more ways than one. Comedy, with David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Lennard Pearce

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del and Rodney reluctantly agree to let Grandad accompany them on their holiday abroad - a decision they come to regret. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Lennard Pearce

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: After lending assistance to a wealthy woman in distress, Del seizes a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to improve his social standing by launching his own chandelier-cleaning business. As part of the venture, he ropes a reluctant Rodney and Grandad into helping him. David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst star

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Rodney leaves home after a fight with Cassandra, and arranges a date with receptionist Tanya in an effort to make his wife jealous - but Dels interference ensures the plan fails to go as smoothly as it should. programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: First episode of Richard Curtiss comedy, starring Dawn French as the new vicar of a sleepy English village. Her arrival causes consternation among the locals - particularly stuffy councillor David Horton, who vows to have her ejected at all costs. Gary Waldhorn, James Fleet and Emma Chambers co-star

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: The Songs of Praise crew visits Dibley to record a programme in the village church. However, when Geraldine develops a crush on the producer her wayward emotions threaten to plunge the proceedings into disaster. Comedy, guest starring Peter Capaldi (The Thick of It)

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Geraldine is keen to find a celebrity to open the autumn fair in style - and Alice inadvertently comes up with the ideal candidate by letting slip she is related to one Reg Dwight - AKA Elton John. Comedy, starring Dawn French, and Emma Chambers with a guest appearance by Kylie Minogue. First shown in 1994

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: A violent storm destroys St Barnabass stained glass window, and Geraldine is put in charge of raising funds to replace it - but the others are unsure whether any of her outlandish ideas will actually work. Comedy, starring Dawn French, Gary Waldhorn, James Fleet, Emma Chambers and Liz Smith

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Local election fever hits the village and Geraldine finds she is a more popular candidate with the voters than over-confident parish council chairman David. Richard Curtiss comedy, starring Dawn French and Gary Waldhorn

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: A funeral for a pet bird inspires Geraldine to transform the church into an ark and hold a special service for the animals of the village - but David is far from impressed by her stunt. Comedy, starring Dawn French and Gary Waldhorn

programme.title: The Royle Family
programme.desc: Denise is avoiding actually doing anything for Baby David, so its Cheryl who goes upstairs when his cries on the baby-monitor get too loud to be ignored

programme.desc: In a bid to liven up the camp, Joe Maplin decrees a weekly Sunshine Smile Day - giving perennial wide-boy Ted the perfect opportunity to fleece unsuspecting holiday-makers out of their spare cash. Comedy, starring Paul Shane

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.sub-title: The Long Legs of the Law
programme.desc: Rodney starts going out with a policewoman, much to the consternation of dodgy dealer Del-Boy, who is terrified that one wrong word from his little brother could see him banged up for five years. Vintage comedy, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst, David Jason and Lennard Pearce

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del gets the chance to sell off a couple of antique urns - the only problem being that one of them contains the ashes of Triggers late grandfather. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst, Lennard Pearce and Roger Lloyd Pack

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del takes up cards in his latest bid to make his first million - much to the annoyance of Rodney and Grandad, who reckon he will end up gambling away all their worldly goods. Comedy with the wheeler-dealing Trotter family, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Lennard Pearce

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del-Boy cannot believe his ears when Rodney tells him he has found a girlfriend. The trouble is, the woman is old enough to be his mother - and to make matters worse, her husband is about to be released from prison

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del jumps at the opportunity to decorate the local Chinese restaurant to make a quick profit, and the results are outstanding in more ways than one. Comedy, with David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Lennard Pearce

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del and Rodney reluctantly agree to let Grandad accompany them on their holiday abroad - a decision they come to regret. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Lennard Pearce

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: After lending assistance to a wealthy woman in distress, Del seizes a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to improve his social standing by launching his own chandelier-cleaning business. As part of the venture, he ropes a reluctant Rodney and Grandad into helping him. David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst star

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Rodney leaves home after a fight with Cassandra, and arranges a date with receptionist Tanya in an effort to make his wife jealous - but Dels interference ensures the plan fails to go as smoothly as it should. Christmas special first shown in 1990, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Buster Merryfield

programme.desc: Documentary following West Midlands ambulance workers. Michelle and Simon rush to a young man who has collapsed at work, while Gaz and Debbie help a teenager with chest pain

programme.title: Michael McIntyres The Wheel
programme.desc: Award-winning comedian Michael McIntyre hosts, as contestants, guided by celebrity experts including Rachel Riley, Joel Dommett and Daisy Lowe, attempt to answer their way to a sizable cash prize

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Arun is incensed when a gang on the Bronte estate sets upon a young couple. He is then completely taken in by one of the local youngsters, who draws him into a trap that strips him of his dignity - and most of his uniform. Smithy sets out to trace the gang by way of Aruns stolen radio, and the crusading PC is shocked to discover who is masterminding the beatings and muggings - and is all the more determined to nail them this time

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: A missing 15-year-old is found unconscious and badly beaten in an alleyway, a sight that touches a nerve with Leon, who is reminded of events buried in his own past. CCTV footage reveals the girl had argued violently with her barman boyfriend on the night of the attack, but he claims this was because he broke off their relationship after discovering she was much younger than she claimed

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Elize Du Toit guest stars as a barristers daughter with a cocaine habit, who is beaten up and pushed out of a car by her supplier when she fails to settle her debts. Terry goes undercover as a cab driver for the company run by the suspected dealer and his first drop turns out to be more hazardous than anticipated

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: First of a two-part story, originally shown to to celebrate 25 years of The Bill, filmed in London and Germany in collaboration with the cast and crew of German series SOKO: Leipzig. Working undercover as a cab driver, Terry is caught up in an international kidnap plot which forces the Sun Hill watch to work closely with their continental colleagues to rescue the goddaughter of a senior officer

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Concluding the two-part story filmed in London and Germany in collaboration with the cast and crew of drama series SOKO: Leipzig. Jack and his team track the kidnap gang to Germany and help arrange a ransom pick-up at Leipzig railway station, but the operation proves to be a set-up leading nowhere. The case takes a violent turn, prompting an unexpected confession from the kidnapped girls stepfather (Max Herbrechter) and a desperate race to reach the hostages before it is too late

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: 999 Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A man is left with a metal spike impaled in his face after a traumatic incident on a construction site, sparking a huge rescue operation. Medics help a man who was hit by a car

programme.title: 999 Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A woman plunges 10ft through the floorboards of her Sheffield home in a freak accident, and the HART team launch a major rescue operation to save her

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: Mouthy schoolgirl Lauren questions her teachers sexuality, and guest star Peter Kay pays Nan a visit for a rendition of Bridge Over Troubled Water

programme.title: Nurses Down Under
programme.desc: Father-of-three Chris undergoes high risk brain surgery and mental health nurse Kate is called into a police station to treat a confused woman at risk of self-harm

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Shooting Joe Exotic
programme.desc: Louis revisits his 2011 documentary Americas Most Dangerous Pets, returning to Oklahoma to explore what has happened since. Joe Exotic, aka Joseph Allen Maldonado-Passage, now resides in a federal prison after being found guilty of a murder-for-hire plot and multiple animal cruelty charges, and having been the subject of hit Netflix documentary Tiger King

programme.title: Michael McIntyres The Wheel
programme.desc: Award-winning comedian Michael McIntyre hosts, as contestants take on a colossal spinning wheel and answer questions in the hope of securing the cash prize

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Susan becomes addicted to whodunits and jumps at the chance to solve a real-life murder mystery after one of Bens patients makes a startling confession while under anaesthetic. Unfortunately, her efforts to unmask the killer result in a cover-up of her own. Zoe Wanamaker and Robert Lindsay star

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Ben and Susan experience problems in the bedroom, leaving Abi convinced she is the one to blame. Janey tries her hand at being a personal shopper and Michael gets caught up in a case of mistaken identity. Robert Lindsay and Zoe Wanamaker star

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: The Harper household is thrown into turmoil after a famous heart-throb visits Bens surgery, but while Susan is busy swooning, Michael spots a money-making opportunity. Guest starring Peter Capaldi, alongside Robert Lindsay and Zoe Wanamaker

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Bored with the everyday routine in the Harper household, Susan decides to lead her life as a free and single girl again. Janey takes the opportunity to step into the role of home-maker and Ben simply runs away. Domestic comedy, starring Robert Lindsay and Zoe Wanamaker

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Michael runs a booking agency for Rogers exclusive use, Susan hopes to take a step up in the literary world by attending a neighbours book club and Ben stakes a claim on the sofa

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Ben finds himself overrun with partners when plans to set up in Harley Street go awry, and Susan decides to give her husbands dental conference a miss in favour of writing her novel. Comedy, guest starring Windsor Davies, with Robert Lindsay and Zoe Wanamaker

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A five-year-old Bedlington terrier, who has suffered a broken front leg three times in the last four years, is referred to Noel with another fracture in her leg. Elsewhere, beloved fox red Labrador Jethro has arthritic elbows, which have left him unable to walk properly and are causing him great pain. Noel uses a tiny camera to take a closer look at the joint damage and determine the best course of action

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A Maine Coon cat is brought into the practice with a fractured hip joint, which Noel determines is caused by a genetic disease that has made the heads of both of her femur bones degenerate. After a very challenging process of weighing up the pros and cons of surgery, the owners opt for bilateral total hip replacement.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Eight-month-old Labrador puppy Ollie is rushed in as a late-night emergency after being hit by a car, while four-year-old bull mastiff Bayleigh is referred to Noel with a suspicious and painful lump near her ankle. Cassie and Ashley thought their only option was to have their cats leg amputated, but a chance encounter with Noel has given them hope that it could possibly be saved.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: The work of a pioneering veterinary practice, where Bionic Vet Noel Fitzpatrick and a team of more than 100 surgeons, nurses, ward attendants and physiotherapists help some of the nations hardest-to-cure pets through cutting-edge treatment and operations. This series opens with a special episode featuring the amazing stories - old and new - of some of the youngest and cutest puppies for whom Noel has provided life-saving treatment since The Supervet began in 2014, and the families at the centre of their inspiring stories

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: The series showcasing the extraordinary work of veterinary surgeon Professor Noel Fitzpatrick and his team at Fitzpatrick Referrals where families from all over the world seek hope and solutions for their animal friends. Two-year-old Boston terrier Rogan needs Noels help with his debilitating hip dysplasia. Noel explains to Rogans mums Megan and Shana that, due to Rogans age and breed, an off-the-shelf cemented total hip replacement has an increased chance of loosening over time. Noels offered alternative is a next-generation uncemented implant system, custom-made for Rogan. Handsome nine-year-old Hungarian vizsla Brodie is affected by developmental elbow disease. Noel finds that the joint has completely collapsed and is infected as the result of a previous botched operation by another vet. Poor Brodie is now in constant pain, but Noel is able to restore hope for Brodie and his family with a new customised implant system that will fuse the damaged bones together. And Vinnie the two-year-old tabby cat is rushed into the surgery after being hit by a car. Thankfully he has no internal injuries but he has sustained significant damage to his back legs. Noel and the team fight to repair the damage before infection can take hold

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The paramedics treat a young mum with severe stomach pains, take a breathless pensioner to hospital and attend an elderly lady with dementia whose nose will not stop bleeding

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Dudley crews attend a man with heart failure and sepsis, as well as a transgender patient in pain from an old injury. In Stoke, a patient has a panic attack in the ambulance

programme.title: Inside the Operating Theatre
programme.desc: Dr Fox is in the visitors room for a change when his fiancee Sally has an operation to remove her wisdom teeth. Another patient has surgery to have a double hernia repaired

programme.title: Inside the Operating Theatre
programme.desc: One patient is flown home from holiday for an urgent operation to repair a detached retina, while another has a leaky vein that has caused an ulcer in his leg

programme.title: The Young Midwives of Essex
programme.sub-title: Not Everything Is Butterflies and Rainbows
programme.desc: The preceptorship midwives undergo bereavement training, while Aimee helps a family who have lost their baby

programme.title: Nurses Down Under
programme.desc: Its the football season, and the Emergency Department at St Vincents is dealing with shoulder injuries

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Transgender Kids
programme.desc: Louis travels to San Francisco, where pioneering medical professionals are helping children who say they were born in the wrong body to transition from one sex to the other. At the Child and Adolescent Gender Centre at UCSF Hospital, he meets youngsters who have been diagnosed with gender dysphoria and who are undergoing medical interventions, from puberty blockers to hormone-replacement therapy and ultimately gender-reassignment surgery. Louis spends time with the clinics patients and their families as they negotiate their way along this life-changing and emotional journey

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Law and Disorder
programme.sub-title: Louis Theroux: Law and Disorder in Johannesburg
programme.desc: Award-winning journalist Louis Theroux visits Johannesburg, where locals have turned to an industry of private security firms after losing trust in the police

programme.title: Michael McIntyres The Wheel
programme.desc: The comedian hosts the Saturday-night game show, as contestants take on a colossal spinning wheel and answer questions in the hope of securing a cash prize. Chris Packham, Ranj Singh, Jo Whiley, Fallon Sherrock, Ainsley Harriott, Shirley Ballas and Mark-Francis Vandelli are on hand to help the contestants

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: Today, Fresh Is Best! The Top 5 have 60 minutes to create a dish using Perino tomatoes and at least two ingredients from the MasterChef garden

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien travel across the UK to find unique and valuable items languishing in peoples homes and use creative thinking and elbow grease to fix them up to turn a profit for their owners. Here they unearth a church pew, create a fish tank from scrap and uncover a special petrol tank

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team venture to Northumberland to finish a build they started just before the pandemic, helping a couple whose 18-year-old daughter has complex medical and mental health issues. Nick and designer Gabrielle Blackman put out the call to local trades and volunteers, who turn up en masse and completely redesign the house, add an extension and create a home that works for everyone

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team travel to Fegg Hayes in Stoke-on-Trent, where Sues family have lived for six generations. To tackle poverty, isolation and mental health problems, they have taken over a patch of wasteland in the heart of the community, with the aim of creating a community garden and centre with room to grow vegetables and space where young and old can share knowledge and experiences. The DIY SOS team are determined to help get the job done, accompanied by hundreds of local tradespeople - only to run into the worst storms to hit Britain in recent years

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Tipping Point

Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Four-year-old pug and beagle cross Barney is brought into Fitzpatrick Referrals after being hit by a bus. The dog has lost 40 per cent of the bone in the damaged leg, so Noel creates an innovative two-tier treatment, involving an external ankle frame for support. Sisters Rosemary and Diane bring in their five-year-old basset hound Albert when they find he is suddenly unable to move his back legs, and 10-month-old Labrador cross Gylly receives treatment for lameness and an unusual bone deformity

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Golden retriever poodle-cross Sukis front legs have developed abnormally and now require urgent attention as the bones of her forearms are growing at different rates, so Noel decides that major surgery is required. Beloved elderly Labrador Raffa is nearly 11 and has become lame with constant pain in his front legs, and Noel discovers cartilage erosion in both elbows. Meanwhile, five-year-old dachshund Zizi is rushed in after suddenly losing the use of her back legs overnight, and an urgent MRI scan confirms that Zizi has suffered an exploded disc
